##  Description
<!-- Provide a clear and concise description of the changes made and the motivation behind them. -->

##  Type of Change
- [ ]  Bug fix
- [ ]  New feature
- [ ]  Breaking change
- [ ]  Refactor / Documentation / Style

##  Testing & Quality
<!-- Describe the tests you ran and how they prove the change works. -->
- [ ]  All tests pass locally (`yarn test`)
- [ ]  Build is successful (`yarn build`)
- [ ]  UI verified on mobile/desktop (if applicable)


##  Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] I have updated documentation/README if needed.
- [ ] I have verified security implications of this change.
